name: noisemaker-hlsl-tools
description: Offline tooling for the noisemaker-hlsl Unity port. These scripts import the SIBLING reference engine (../../shaders/src/index.js) — the unchanged JS Noisemaker compiler — to (a) export GOLDEN render-graph JSON from DSL (export-graph.mjs) and (b) regenerate all effect-definition JSON for the Unity package (convert-definitions.mjs). No build step is required; the reference is plain browser-compatible ESM run under Node only for tooling. Override the reference root with NM_REFERENCE_ROOT if this folder is relocated.
